title: Scotland Supports ZeroAvia's Hydrogen Propulsion Manufacturing in Glasgow

sections.heading: Government Funding Announcement
sections.content: The Scottish government announced a funding package of £9 million to bolster ZeroAvia's initiative to create a manufacturing plant for hydrogen-electric propulsion systems in Glasgow.

sections.heading: ZeroAvia's Sustainable Aviation Goals
sections.content: ZeroAvia is focused on developing hydrogen-based technology aimed at reducing aviation emissions. The funding is expected to play a critical role in advancing this sustainable aviation project.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Scotland Backs ZeroAvia's Hydrogen Propulsion Manufacturing Site in Glasgow
